# UC-15.4.8 · APC ATS SNMP Source Failover and Transfer Events

## Description

ATS transfers indicate upstream utility or generator events; silent failures leave site on unintended source.

## Value

Supports DR drills and utility SLA evidence.

## Implementation

(1) Normalize enum mapping for source A/B. (2) Correlate with genset logs.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ats" earliest=-7d
| eval src=coalesce(atsInputSourceStatus, atsActiveSource, source, "")
| eval prev=coalesce(prev_source, "")
| where match(lower(_raw), "(?i)transfer|fail|source.*switch") OR src!=prev
| stats count by ats_name src
```

## Visualization

Timeline transfers; count by week.

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
